feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.task_description: Rewrite nf:mcp-status to be fully dynamic: read all slot names and types from ~/.claude.json at runtime, compute banner counts dynamically, and query the correct identity/health_check tools for actual configured slots instead of hardcoded claude-1..6 and codex/gemini/opencode/copilot names
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.approach: Read all slot names and types from ~/.claude.json at runtime, classify each slot (CLI/HTTP/local-MCP/skip) dynamically, compute banner counts from the classification, and build the Step 3 sub-agent tool list from actual configured slots — replacing all hardcoded claude-1..6 and codex/gemini/opencode/copilot-1 references throughout the skill.
out_of_scope: Adding new MCP server types or providers beyond what exists in the current config
Modifying the providers.json file structure or slot naming conventions
Implementing caching or persistent storage of slot configurations
Changing the display format or table columns
Fixing other MCP skills (mcp-repair, mcp-restart, mcp-update, etc.) — only mcp-status.md in scope
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.risk_reason: Modifying commands/nf/mcp-status.md (workflow file) with dynamic runtime logic replacing hardcoded slot names. Scoped to single file but affects user-facing diagnostics.
